item.name: E.B.E.-852738
item.description:
A king among E.B.E.s-9318, and lord of limne 3-β.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: If we take at face value the assertion that the E.B.E.-9318s are observational appendages of extra-dimensional entities, then perhaps it follows that this anomaly, with its unusually large and unblinking “eye,” is of even greater use in observing the phenomena of our cosmos. Or perhaps this theory, too, reflects our terrifyingly limited perspective.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The Sea of Stars
